hero.title: Business dashboard

hero.title: Batch shipping
hero.subtitle: Upload a .xls, .xlsx, or .csv file to import shipments in bulk. The system will create a Shipping batch asynchronously.

upload.subtitle: Supports .xls, .xlsx, and .csv. Download the template first. After submission, check progress and labels in Order list > Batch shipping status.

messages.batchCreated: Batch {sn} (ID {id}) created. Background parsing is in progress.

dataCenterSalesAnalysis.title: Sales analysis
dataCenterSalesAnalysis.subtitle: Matches the sales view in the order list: summarize inventory and sales by SKU / warehouse. Inventory assessment is more accurate after filtering by warehouse.

tooltips.ratioLine1: Inventory ratio = stock qty ÷ sales qty
tooltips.ratioLine2: Statistics range: from the 1st of last month to the 1st of this month
tooltips.statusLow: Low stock: ratio below 0.3 and stock above 0
tooltips.statusHigh: High stock: ratio above 3.0 or no outbound sales
tooltips.statusOut: Out of stock: stock ≤ 0 and outbound sales exist
tooltips.statusNote: Note: query after filtering by warehouse

messages.exportNoData: No data to export under current filters
messages.exportSuccess: Exported {count} rows (up to {max} rows per export)

dataCenterInventoryData.title: Inventory data
dataCenterInventoryData.subtitle: View on-hand quantity, warning thresholds, and zone inventory by SKU / warehouse. Supports paginated queries after filtering.

accountPersonalization.title: Automatic channel configuration
accountPersonalization.subtitle: Automatic channel strategy with three-level fallback.
accountPersonalization.alert: When imported orders choose automatic channel selection, the system tries primary, secondary, then fallback channels until an order is created successfully.

hints.primary: The system tries this channel first.
hints.secondary: If the primary channel fails, the system retries this channel.
hints.fallback: Used after the first two levels fail as the final safeguard.

messages.primaryRequired: Please select the primary shipping method

aiSubscription.title: ATWindow AI Insight Subscription
aiSubscription.subtitle: Subscribe to monthly auto-analysis plans for detailed movement control

tierDesc.1: Basic analysis on an irregular auto-generation schedule
tierDesc.2: Deep warehouse data analysis once every half month
tierDesc.3: Deep warehouse data analysis once every week

actions.confirmUpgrade:
The system will immediately debit the first period subscription fee of {price} from your account balance. Due to data initialization and synchronization requirements, AI insight access will officially start on **{date} (Next Monday)**.

Confirm activation of this plan?
actions.confirmChange:
You have scheduled a change to the 【{tierName}】 plan. This action will not result in immediate billing. The change will take effect at the start of the next billing cycle (**{date}**), at which point billing will automatically continue at the new rate.

Confirm scheduling this change?

hero.title: Create shipment
hero.subtitle: After selecting a channel, choose sender and recipient addresses from the address book or add/edit them in the dialog. Enter package and item details to calculate rates. Compare mode lets you quote multiple channels.
hero.subtitleCopy: Data pre-filled from the original order. Please modify the reference number before submitting.

globalNotice.insurance: To protect your shipment and purchase insurance, please contact customer service for assistance.

channel.title: Channel selection
channel.subtitle: The selected channel affects currency, declaration rules, and country restrictions.
channel.compareModeAlert: Compare mode is on: you can select multiple channels.

basic.title: Basic information
basic.subtitle: The reference number and units are used for rate calculation and order submission.
basic.referencePlaceholder: Letters, numbers, and underscores only. 15+ characters recommended
basic.referenceHint: Only letters, numbers, and underscores are allowed. Invalid characters are removed after blur or IME composition ends.

address.senderEmpty: Select an existing sender address from the address book, or add a new one in the dialog. Once confirmed, it is read-only here. Use Edit or select another address to change it.
address.senderBeianOnly: The selected channels include one that requires a registered sender address. Please select a registered sender address from the address book. Manual add or edit is not allowed.
address.receiverEmpty: Select an existing recipient address from the address book, or add a new one in the dialog. Once confirmed, it is read-only here. Use Edit or select another address to change it.
address.senderCountryLock: This channel limits the sender country to: {country}
address.receiverCountryLock: This channel limits the recipient country to: {country}

package.title: Package information
package.subtitle: Enter actual weight and outer package dimensions for billing and volumetric checks.

rate.title: Rate result
rate.subtitle: Calculate after completing the form. Compare mode lists multi-channel quotes from low to high.
rate.emptyCompare: Complete the form and click Calculate rate to view multi-channel comparison results
rate.emptySingle: Complete the form and click Calculate rate to view the quote
rate.quoteReturned: A quote was returned. Confirm the fee details below or select a route.
rate.noRoutes: No selectable routes were returned for this quote
rate.compareSummary: {count} channel quotes returned, sorted from low to high

dialogs.addressBookSubtitle: Filter by name on the server. Click Select or double-click a row to fill the form.

messages.referenceInvalidSubmit: Reference number only allows letters, numbers, and underscores. Submission blocked.
messages.referenceInvalid: Reference number only allows letters, numbers, and underscores
messages.keepCompareChannel: Keep at least one channel in compare mode
messages.senderRequired: Complete required sender information: name, address line 1, city, state/province, postcode, and phone
messages.receiverRequired: Complete required recipient information: name, address line 1, city, state/province, postcode, and phone
messages.addressMustBeLocked: Confirm sender and recipient addresses by selecting from the address book or adding an address before rating or ordering
messages.senderBeianRequired: The selected channels include one that requires a registered sender address. Please select a registered sender address from the address book first.
messages.senderBeianAddressOnly: The selected channels include one that requires a registered sender address. The sender address can only be selected from the address book.
messages.senderAddressResetForChannelChange: Channel requirements changed. The previously selected sender address was cleared. Please choose a sender address that matches the new requirements.
messages.packageRequired: Enter package weight and dimensions: length, width, and height
messages.selectRateChannel: Select at least one channel for rate calculation
messages.rateFailed: Rate calculation failed. Check the form and try again.
messages.compareNoData: Comparison request succeeded, but no displayable channel quotes were returned
messages.routeMissingAfterRate: This channel requires route selection, but no selectable routes were returned. Check the address and package information.
messages.networkRetry: Network request failed. Please try again.
messages.keepOneProduct: Keep at least one item row
messages.noEmptyProductRow: All rows already have data, cannot fill default item
messages.providerInvalid: Channel configuration is invalid, unable to order
messages.orderSuccess: Order created. Label generation is in progress. Please check the order list.
messages.unauthorized: Login expired. Please sign in again.
messages.copyLoaded: Order data loaded. Please modify the reference number before submitting.
messages.compareModeSubmitBlocked: Compare mode is for rate calculation only. Turn it off and select one channel to order.
messages.rateBeforeOrder: Calculate rates and select a route before ordering with this channel
messages.noRouteForOrder: This channel returned no selectable routes and cannot be ordered now
messages.selectRouteBeforeOrder: Select a route before submitting the order

Confirm ordering with channel "{channel}"?
Route: {route} · Fee: {fee} {currency}
